description_long: This is a rectangular, double-sided advertising board with a prominent red background and bold Chinese characters displayed vertically. The board features a decorative pink flower graphic in the lower section, adding visual interest to the otherwise text-heavy design. The frame appears to be made of dark, possibly metal material, with a slightly weathered or aged finish, giving it a sturdy and durable look. Three horizontal rods extend from each side, likely for mounting or securing the board to a wall or pole. The sign's surface is glossy, suggesting a protective coating over the printed content. The overall design is utilitarian, intended for clear visibility in busy urban environments.
description: A double-sided, rectangular advertising board with bold Chinese characters and a pink flower on a red background, framed in dark metal with mounting rods.
description_view_0: A narrow side view showing the thin profile of the board and the protruding mounting rods.
description_view_1: The front view displays the full advertising content: bold Chinese characters and a pink flower on a red background, framed by a dark border.
description_view_2: Another narrow side view, similar to view 0, highlighting the board's slimness and the mounting rods.
description_view_3: The back view, identical to the front, shows the same Chinese characters and flower graphic, confirming the double-sided design.
attribute_frame_design: medium-thickness dark metal frame with slightly rounded corners
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed sign with Chinese characters and a pink flower graphic
